message:
feat(core,parser,vdbe): connection improvements, conformance oracle tests, semantic/expression enhancements

Connection layer:
- Major connection.rs improvements (295-line diff) for better query handling
- Parameter compatibility fix in compat/params.rs

Parser & semantic analysis:
- Expression parser enhancements (expr.rs) and semantic analysis improvements
- New semantic test cases validating the analysis changes

Test infrastructure:
- 611+ lines of new conformance oracle extension tests (conformance_oracle_ext.rs)
- Interior delete test cases for btree module
- Log schema validator updates in harness

Subsystem improvements:
- Extended C API compatibility layer (fsqlite-c-api)
- Added builtin function implementations + function registry updates (fsqlite-func)
- SSI validation improvements (fsqlite-mvcc)
- Pager fixes (4 lines removed) + S3-FIFO cache improvements
- VDBE frame improvements + dependency version bump
- Memory VFS improvements
- Updated e2e test dependencies

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
